slides.page_goal: Open the deck with a clear business tone.
slides.page_identity: Generate a 16:9 Chinese client-facing PPT cover page, not a poster, not a background-only image.
slides.native_structure_lock: Keep this page as a cover.
slides.note: Keep the title readable and stable.
qa_focus: page reads like a real client-facing slide
repair_hints: reduce background detail if the title softens
do not replace AI with other English words
strengthen cover-page identity before adding effects
text_regions: subtitle zone: Board briefing, Draft discussion
slides.prompt_override:
Generate a 16:9 Chinese client-facing PPT cover page, not a poster, not a background-only image. Page type: cover. Reading path: top to bottom. Composition: large title zone with stable subtitle zone. Style: business, presentation-ready, deep navy and cobalt blue, subtle futuristic atmosphere, dark glass panels, high contrast. Text rule: only show the following text, each line once only, do not add extra English labels, numbers, or small UI copy. Negative rules: no poster look, no giant hero figure, no watermark, no blurry text. 【页面文字】
AI adoption roadmap
Board briefing
Draft discussion

slides.page_goal: Show the implementation route in one obvious reading path.
slides.page_identity: Generate a 16:9 Chinese client-facing PPT path page, not a poster, not a dashboard screenshot.
slides.native_structure_lock: Keep this page as a path page even if more explanation is added.
slides.note: Use a single horizontal path, not a dense process map.
qa_focus: the route reads from left to right
stage blocks keep one visual style
repair_hints: simplify the route if labels crowd
make the reading path more explicit
text_regions: path nodes: Assess, Design, Pilot, Roll out
negative_rules: no extra digits or percent signs
slides.prompt_override:
Generate a 16:9 Chinese client-facing PPT path page, not a poster, not a dashboard screenshot. Page type: path page. Reading path: left to right. Composition: top title zone, one center horizontal route with four stable stage modules, one bottom summary strip if needed. Style: business, proposal-ready, deep navy, cobalt blue, ice blue accents, dark glass cards. Text rule: only show the following text, each line once only, do not add extra labels, digits, or tiny chart copy. Negative rules: no poster look, no fake dashboard clutter, no repeated summary strip, no blurry text. 【页面文字】
Implementation path
Assess
Design
Pilot
Roll out

slides.page_goal: Show how the current-state diagnosis is structured.
slides.page_identity: Generate a 16:9 Chinese client-facing PPT diagnostic page, not a poster, not a generic infographic.
slides.native_structure_lock: Keep this page as a 2x2 diagnostic layout.
slides.reading_path: top to bottom, then left to right inside the grid
qa_focus: card titles stay short and sharp
repair_hints: shorten card titles before shrinking body text
split the page if the 2x2 grid becomes crowded
restore the 2x2 page identity if the layout drifts
text_regions: grid cells: Process, Data, Issues, Outputs
slides.prompt_override:
Generate a 16:9 Chinese client-facing PPT diagnostic page, not a poster, not a generic infographic. Page type: 2x2 diagnostic grid. Reading path: title first, then left to right across the grid. Composition: stable title zone, balanced 2x2 cards, controlled bottom space. Style: business, consulting-style, deep navy and cobalt blue, restrained futuristic atmosphere, dark glass cards. Text rule: only show the following text, each line once only, do not add extra English, repeated words, or fake chart labels. Negative rules: no poster look, no clutter, no blurry text. 【页面文字】
Current-state diagnosis
Process
Data
Issues
Outputs
